question: Bitcoin Up or Down - February 12, 12:15AM-12:20AM ET
description:

The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the BTC/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/btc-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream BTC/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - February 13, 9PM ET
description:

question: Counter-Strike: Sinners vs fnatic (BO3) - IEM Atlanta: Global Qualifier Playoffs
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Sinners and fnatic in the IEM Atlanta: Global Qualifier Playoffs, scheduled for February 12 at 11:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Sinners" if Sinners win the match against fnatic.

This market will resolve to "fnatic" if fnatic win the match against Sinners.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org/.

question: Map Handicap: WB (-1.5) vs Leo Team (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Leo Team and WHITEBIRD in the CCT Europe Series #15 Group Stage, scheduled for February 12 at 10:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "WHITEBIRD" if WHITEBIRD wins 2 or more maps than Leo Team in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Leo Team".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.
groupItemTitle: Map Handicap: WB (-1.5) vs Leo Team (+1.5)

events.title: Counter-Strike: Leo Team vs WHITEBIRD (BO3) - CCT Europe Series #15 Group Stage
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Leo Team and WHITEBIRD in the CCT Europe Series #15 Group Stage, scheduled for February 12 at 10:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Leo Team" if Leo Team win the match against WHITEBIRD.

This market will resolve to "WHITEBIRD" if WHITEBIRD win the match against Leo Team.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org/.

question: Map Handicap: VIT (-1.5) vs Fnatic (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Valorant match between Fnatic and Team Vitality in the VCT EMEA Kickoff Playoffs, scheduled for February 13 at 8:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Team Vitality" if Team Vitality wins 2 or more maps than Fnatic in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Fnatic".

question: First Blood in Game 1?
description:
In the upcoming match between Nigma Galaxy and Zero Tenacity in the DreamLeague Division 2 Playoffs, scheduled for February 12 at 8:30AM ET:

This market will resolve to the team that secures the first blood in Game 1.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If Game 1 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to whichever team secured the first blood prior to stoppage. If the first blood did not occur, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is remade, this market will resolve to whichever team secured the first blood prior to the remake. If the first blood did not occur prior to the remake, resolution will be based on the remade game.

If Game 1 is completed but first blood never occurred, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

events.title: Dota 2: Nigma Galaxy vs Zero Tenacity (BO3) - DreamLeague Division 2 Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Nigma Galaxy and Zero Tenacity in the DreamLeague Division 2 Playoffs, scheduled for February 12 at 8:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Nigma Galaxy" if Nigma Galaxy win the match against Zero Tenacity.

This market will resolve to "Zero Tenacity" if Zero Tenacity win the match against Nigma Galaxy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.liquipedia.net/dota2/Main_Page.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - February 13, 11PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the ETH/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the ETH/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/ETH_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance ETH/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: LoL: Onion Team vs DOCISK (BO1) - Rift Legends Group Stage
description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Onion Team and DOCISK in the Rift Legends Group Stage, scheduled for February 14 at 5:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Onion Team" if Onion Team win the match against DOCISK.

This market will resolve to "DOCISK" if DOCISK win the match against Onion Team.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/leagueoflegends/Main_Page.

question: Spread: Thunder (-12.5)
description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for February 12 at 7:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Thunder" if the Thunder win the game by 13 or more points.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Bucks". If the game ends in a tie, this market will resolve to "Bucks".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.description:

question: Total Kills Over/Under 49.5 in Game 2?
description:
In the upcoming match between Nigma Galaxy and Zero Tenacity in the DreamLeague Division 2 Playoffs, scheduled for February 12 at 8:30AM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 2.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 2 is 50 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Nigma Galaxy and Zero Tenacity in the DreamLeague Division 2 Playoffs, scheduled for February 12 at 8:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Nigma Galaxy" if Nigma Galaxy win the match against Zero Tenacity.

This market will resolve to "Zero Tenacity" if Zero Tenacity win the match against Nigma Galaxy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.liquipedia.net/dota2/Main_Page.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - February 14, 12AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.
